summary: Validated FITSIOMAX v3 role boards on public URL with backend+UI testing. Role board loading works for all 6 credentials, but default branch admin seed user is not branch-linked, causing booking workflow failure in role-based UI action flow.

critical.issue: Default branch admin user logs in with branch_id=null; branch-scoped workflows cannot reliably operate with required credential set.

minor.issue: For branch_admin, update uses branch_id filter but response re-reads by id regardless of matched_count; can return 200 with unchanged stage when update did not apply.
callback_url is hardcoded to preview domain in backend instead of environment-driven configuration.

ui_bugs.issue: Using default branch admin credential, Check Available returns no doctors in tested workflow and blocks booking completion path.

integration_issues.issue: Flow breaks at booking stage for default branchadmin credential due to missing branch-linked context and no available-doctor options for selected slot.

action_items: Fix v3_seed so default branchadmin@fitsiomax.com receives a valid branch_id (similar to headphysio/physio assignment).
In /api/v3/leads/{lead_id}/confirm, validate matched_count and return proper 404/403 when scoped update does not apply.
Replace hardcoded sheets callback URL with env-based value.
After fixes, rerun branch admin UI action flow: confirm -> check available doctors -> book appointment with default credential set.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py remains a very large multi-domain file (>2000 lines), increasing regression risk; split by v1/v2/v3 routers/services.
Seed/user integrity issue: branch admin default account is not mapped to a branch while role workflows expect branch scope.
MOCKED: Lead Source Preview card is using getRoleSelectionMock helper, not live backend source-tab data.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (role board load/visibility passed; one critical branch-admin booking action flow failed)

seed_data_creation: Created UI test leads during role-action checks via Pre-sales flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role board rendering is stable for all six logins and no irrelevant failed sheets API calls were observed on non-sheet roles. Use default branchadmin credential to verify branch-linked action path after seed fix. Also verify confirm endpoint does not return success when no scoped update occurred.
rca of the issue: Root cause: v3_seed inserts branchadmin@fitsiomax.com with branch_id=None and only auto-links headphysio/physio to first branch. This leaves required default branch admin without branch context. Reproduction: login as branchadmin@fitsiomax.com -> inspect user.branch_id (null) -> role booking flow often cannot resolve available doctor path for branch-specific lead progression. Mitigation: assign/repair default branch_admin branch_id at seed/migration time and enforce scoped-update validation in confirm API.
